seo.title: How Able Assess Works | Step-by-Step | Able Care
seo.description: Step-by-step walkthrough. Unbox, train, screen, review, share. 5-minute screening process.

blocks.headline: Able Assess in five minutes.
blocks.subtitle: From unboxing to sharing results, every step is designed for simplicity. No specialist training, no complex setup, no clinical background required.

blocks.heading: From unbox to results in five steps

steps.title: Unbox and Charge
steps.description: The sensor arrives ready to use. Download the Able Assess app, pair via Bluetooth and you are up and running in five minutes.

steps.title: Staff Training
steps.description: A 15-minute video or live session covers sensor positioning, the guided workflow and how to interpret results. No clinical certification needed.

steps.title: Run Your First Screening
steps.description: Select the person, hand them the sensor and follow the on-screen prompts. Grip strength and balance assessment completed in under five minutes.

steps.title: Review Results
steps.description: A real-time risk score categorises each person as low, moderate or high risk. Clinical recommendations are generated automatically. All results are auto-saved.

steps.title: Share with Families and Payers
steps.description: Send a secure link, export via FHIR, generate a PDF report or push to OASIS. All sharing is GDPR and HIPAA compliant. Recipients do not need an account.

blocks.heading: Built for any care setting
blocks.body: The sensor is portable, drop-proof and connects to any tablet. Whether you are screening in a clinic, a care home or a person's living room, the workflow stays the same. No bulky equipment, no calibration, no specialist environment.
blocks.imageAlt: Care worker and client using the GripAble sensor and tablet app together

blocks.heading: Integration with falls prevention
blocks.body:
Screening is the starting point, not the end. Able Assess results feed directly into multifactorial falls prevention programs. A high-risk score triggers referral pathways, care plan adjustments and targeted interventions.

Every screening creates a documented evidence trail. This supports regulatory compliance, satisfies payer requirements and gives families confidence that risk is being managed proactively.

items.question: What equipment do I need?
items.answer: One GripAble sensor, one tablet and the Able Assess app. No specialized equipment or clinical infrastructure is required.

items.question: Can non-clinical staff run screenings?
items.answer: Yes. Able Assess is designed for any staff member. The guided workflow handles positioning, timing and scoring automatically. Staff do not need to interpret results.

items.question: How are results shared with families?
items.answer: Results can be shared via a secure link, FHIR export, PDF report or OASIS export. Recipients do not need to create an account to view the results.

items.question: Does it integrate with our EHR?
items.answer: Able Assess supports FHIR R4, OASIS-E and HL7v2 integration standards. Visit the integrations page for full technical details.

blocks.heading: See Able Assess in your workflow
blocks.body: 30 minutes with the clinical team. We will walk through the full five-step process using your care setting as the example.
